samples.xml_description:
<module id="synchronizer">
    <description>Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer. The data_en input is synchronous to clk_a and the data_in input is constant during the period when data_en=1. So, sample the data_in when data_en=1 and synchronize it to clk_b. The data change frequency of data_in is very low. The change interval between two adjacent data is at least 10 clk_b clock cycles. The clock clk_a is responsible for data_in and data_en. The clock clk_b is responsible for the data_en delays two cycles, that is, two D flip-flops. Output the data to dataout.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk_a">Clock signal A.</input>
        <input id="clk_b">Clock signal B.</input>
        <input id="arstn">Active-low reset signal A.</input>
        <input id="brstn">Active-low reset signal B.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[3:0]">Input data.</input>
        <input id="data_en">Input enable signal.</input>
        <output id="dataout" width_description="[3:0]">Output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" type="b" value_description="[0:0]">
            <enum_value id="zero">0</enum_value>
            <enum_value id="one">1</enum_value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic" width_description="[0:0]">
            <source id="state_source" width_description="[0:0]">
                <case>
                    <when condition="rstn==0">0</when>
                    <when condition="state==0 && data_en==1">1</when>
                    <when condition="state==1">1</when>
                </case>
            </source>
        </reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <parablock id="main">
            <statement_list>
                <assign id="data_reg">
                    <case>
                        <when condition="!arstn">0</when>
                        <when condition="1">data_in</when>
                    </case>
                </assign>
                <assign id="en_data_reg">
                    <case>
                        <when condition="!arstn">0</when>
                        <when condition="1">data_en</when>
                    </case>
                </assign>
                <assign id="en_clap_one">
                    <case>
                        <when condition="!brstn">0</when>
                        <when condition="1">en_data_reg</when>
                    </case>
                </assign>
                <assign id="en_clap_two">
                    <case>
                        <when condition="!brstn">0</when>
                        <when condition="1">en_clap_one</when>
                    </case>
                </assign>
                <assign id="dataout">
                    <case>
                        <when condition="!brstn">0</when>
                        <when condition="en_clap_two">data_reg</when>
                    </case>
                </assign>
            </statement_list>
        </parablock>
    </implementation>
</module>
